title: Mazars Comment: Should stocks be so darn happy?
section_path: Mazars Comment: Should stocks be so darn happy?
section_path_text: Mazars Comment: Should stocks be so darn happy?
summary:
Should stocks be so darn happy? By George Lagarias
The three things I would tell my clients on a Monday morning:
Credit conditions are tighter and they are bound to keep tightening for at least a year after rate hikes are done. As such, there's a considerable risk build-up .
